## Engineering & Privacy Checklist
<!-- Please tick the boxes that apply to your changes. -->

- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.

- [ ] **Privacy Check:** My code does NOT introduce any external API calls, tracking, or PII collection. Everything remains processed entirely on-device.
